feed.title: SRAM Force AXS (road)
feed.subtitle: All generations of Force AXS road groupsets — derailleurs, shifters, Force power meter.

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.9
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.9

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - Minor Bugfix and reliability improvement.

Released: 2026-03-04

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: FORCE RD (RD-FRC-E-E1) — firmware 2.54.4
entry.summary:
FORCE RD RD-FRC-E-E1 — firmware 2.54.4

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 2x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported. - Future Product Support

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-E1) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-E1 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: FIVAL FORCE FD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version  before installing this Device Firmware Update.   This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (EB-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.53.2
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) EB-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.53.2

Part: EB R FORCE

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements.  This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-FRC-1E-D2) — firmware 2.49.6
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-FRC-1E-D2 — firmware 2.49.6

Part: FORCE REIGNITION RD XPLR

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. FW 2.49.6 contains improvements in the support and verification of the Firmware during the factory production of the Rear Derailleur.

Released: 2024-10-05

FORCE RD RD-FRC-E-D1 — firmware 2.41.0

Part: RD FORCE

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting.

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: FORCE FD WIDE (FD-FRC-EW-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
FORCE FD WIDE FD-FRC-EW-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: FORCE EXPANSION FD

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: FD FORCE

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-FRC1-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-FRC1-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: FORCE RD MAX 44T

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: FORCE RD (RD-FRC-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
FORCE RD RD-FRC-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RD FORCE

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (EB-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) EB-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: EB R FORCE

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: ED R FORCE

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.4
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.4

Part: ED R FORCE

Battery life improvements – LED illuminates for a shorter period of time when shifter powers up with a low battery. eTap 11-speed derailleur compatibility added – RED and Force eTap AXS 12-speed shift-brake levers and eTap AXS BlipBox can now be paired with legacy eTap 11-speed front and rear derailleurs.

Released: 2021-12-02

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (EB-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.4
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) EB-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.4

Part: EB R FORCE

Battery life improvements – LED illuminates for a shorter period of time when shifter powers up with a low battery. eTap 11-speed derailleur compatibility added – RED and Force eTap AXS 12-speed shift-brake levers and eTap AXS BlipBox can now be paired with legacy eTap 11-speed front and rear derailleurs.

Released: 2021-12-02

entry.title: FORCE RD (RD-FRC-E-D1) — firmware 2.7.3
entry.summary:
FORCE RD RD-FRC-E-D1 — firmware 2.7.3

Part: RD FORCE

Communication of gear and trim position to AXS app. Update sequential and compensating shift modes and persist across power cycle. Optimize motion control.

Released: 2020-06-12
